rows.notes: Consensus on row type and amounts. Description from gemini-flash, as the period in gpt-5-mini's reading is ambiguous in the image and not clearly present.

Description from gemini-flash is a better reading of the text. Crucially, gemini-flash correctly identifies this as a 'header' because the numbers '246 8 9' are part of the descriptive text/reference and not aligned with the formal currency columns. gpt-5-mini misinterprets 'Port up.' as 'Bro't up', and incorrectly parses '246 8 9' as a monetary amount '246 0 9', also misreading the '8' as '0' in the shillings column. Visual inspection confirms '8'.
Description from gpt-5-mini is correct; visual inspection clearly shows 'Viz.' (videlicet), not 'Pigy.' as read by gemini-flash. Consensus on other fields.
Full consensus between extractors.
rows.english_description: Subscription payment to the Infirmary for the year 1830.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription payment to the Infirmary for the year 1830, amounting to £6 6s 0d.
